_instructions.description: Empire Accelerator blog posts. Edit this file to add, update, or remove blog posts.
_instructions.how_to_add_a_post: Copy one of the post objects below, paste it at the TOP of the 'posts' array (after the opening '['), fill in the details, and save.

fields.title: The blog post title
fields.url: Full URL to the post on GHL - e.g. https://masterclass.empire-accelerator.com/post/your-post-slug
fields.excerpt: Short description shown on the blog card (keep under 200 characters)
fields.date: Publication date - format: Month DD, YYYY  e.g. June 11, 2026
fields.image: Full URL to the post cover image (leave empty string if none)
fields.category: Post category shown on the card - e.g. Amazon FBA
fields.author: Author name

posts.title: Why Amazon Is Still One of the Best Business Opportunities in 2026
posts.excerpt: Learn why Amazon remains one of the strongest business opportunities and how entrepreneurs can leverage the platform to build scalable brands and long-term financial freedom.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: Sourcing Secrets: How to Find Reliable Suppliers for Your First FBA Product
posts.excerpt: Learn how to find reliable suppliers, avoid common sourcing mistakes, and confidently launch your first Amazon FBA product with proven supplier selection strategies.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: How an Online Business Can Give You More Time With Your Family — and Help Fund Your Future
posts.excerpt: Most people work hard for their family but spend the least time with them. Discover how building an online business can give you back your time while creating lasting financial security.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: The Hardest Step Toward the Life You Want Is the First One
posts.excerpt: The gap between the life you have and the life you want usually comes down to one thing — taking the first step. Here's how to overcome the hesitation that keeps most people stuck.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: Why Amazon FBA Is the Best Second Income Stream in 2026 (And Better Than Driving for Uber or DoorDash)
posts.excerpt: Compared to driving for Uber or DoorDash, Amazon FBA builds a real asset that generates income around the clock — not just when you're actively working. Here's why it wins.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: Why Amazon FBA Is One of the Best Side Businesses for Busy Professionals and Parents
posts.excerpt: Busy professionals and parents need a business that fits around their life, not the other way around. Amazon FBA offers flexible hours, scalable income, and a proven system that works.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: The Truth About “Too Late” — Why New Sellers Are Still Winning Big on Amazon
posts.excerpt: Many new sellers assume the Amazon opportunity has passed. The data tells a completely different story — and the sellers winning today started with no experience at all.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: How to Build an Amazon Business That Doesn’t Depend on You Daily
posts.excerpt: The goal isn't just to build a business — it's to build one that runs without you constantly in it. Here's how successful Amazon sellers create systems that generate income on autopilot.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: The 7 Biggest Amazon Beginner Mistakes (And How Successful Sellers Avoid Them)
posts.excerpt: Most new Amazon sellers make the same costly mistakes before their first sale. Learn the seven most common pitfalls — and exactly how experienced sellers avoid every single one.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: Private Label vs Wholesale vs Dropshipping: Which Amazon Model Builds Real Wealth?
posts.excerpt: Not all Amazon business models are created equal. We break down the real differences between Private Label, Wholesale, and Dropshipping so you can choose the model that builds lasting wealth.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: How Some Amazon Sellers Hit 5-Figure Revenue in Their First Month
posts.excerpt: Hitting $10,000 or more in your first month isn't a fluke — it's the result of a repeatable system. Here's what separates sellers who launch strong from those who struggle out of the gate.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: From Employee to CEO: What Really Changes When You Start an Amazon Business
posts.excerpt: Starting an Amazon business changes more than your income — it changes how you think, how you work, and how you see opportunity. Here's what really shifts when you make the leap.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: Why 2026 is A Prime Year to Launch Your Amazon FBA Business
posts.excerpt: Between AI-powered tools, shifting consumer habits, and growing demand for quality brands, the conditions for launching a successful Amazon FBA business have never been better.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator

posts.title: The Hidden Cost of Trying to Learn Amazon FBA for Free: YouTube vs. Mentorship
posts.excerpt: Free YouTube tutorials can teach you the basics, but the real cost of going it alone — wasted time, wrong products, costly mistakes — often far exceeds the price of expert mentorship.
posts.author: Empire Accelerator
